creator: mg@fork.pl
text:
I just noticed this:

% grep libexec ./databases/mariadb102-client/work/mariadb-10.2.11/CMakeCache.txt

EXECINFO:FILEPATH=/usr/local/lib/libexecinfo.so


and it looks like there was old broken symlink hanging 
/usr/local/lib/libexecinfo.so -> libexecinfo.so.1

removing it fixed build.
